## 📋 Pull Request Description

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🎨 Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (updates docs)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (code improvement)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (optimization)
- [ ] 🧪 Test (test coverage)
- [ ] 🔒 Security (security improvement)
- [ ] 🔨 Maintenance (chore/dependencies)

---

## 📝 Description

### What does this PR do?
*Briefly describe the changes you made.*

### Why are these changes needed?
*Explain the problem this solves or feature it adds.*

### How does this work?
*Technical details of the implementation.*

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)  
Related to #(issue number)

---

## ✅ Testing

### How have you tested this?
- [ ] Unit tests written
- [ ] Integration tests written
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested locally on Windows/Mac/Linux

### Test Coverage
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added
- [ ] Coverage >= 75%

### Steps to Reproduce (for bug fixes)
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Verify fix works

---

## 🔐 Security Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] No SQL injection vulnerabilities
- [ ] No XSS vulnerabilities
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks applied
- [ ] No broken dependencies
- [ ] Dependencies scanned for vulnerabilities

---

## 📦 Deployment Considerations

- [ ] No database schema changes
- [ ] No breaking API changes
- [ ] No environment variable changes (or added to .env.example)
- [ ] Backward compatible with v3.1
- [ ] Ready for production deployment

**If breaking changes:** Document migration steps below
```
1. Migration step 1
2. Migration step 2
```

---

## 🎯 Quality Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed (reviewed own changes)
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Commits follow conventional commits format
- [ ] Branch name follows naming convention

---

## 📸 Screenshots/Demo (if applicable)

### Before
*Screenshot or description of before state*

### After
*Screenshot or description of after state*

---

## 🚀 Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance degradation
- [ ] Improves performance (details below)
- [ ] Database queries optimized
- [ ] Memory usage acceptable

**Details:** *If performance impact, explain*

---

## 🏗️ Architecture Changes

- [ ] No architecture changes
- [ ] Minor changes (describe below)
- [ ] Major restructuring (requires discussion)

**Details:** *If architecture changes, explain design*

---

## 📖 Additional Notes

*Any additional information reviewers should know*

---

## ✨ Checklist Before Submitting

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits format
- [ ] PR description is clear and complete
- [ ] Branch created from latest origin/main
- [ ] All commits in PR have meaningful messages
- [ ] No merge commits (rebase if needed)
- [ ] Green checkmarks on all automated tests
- [ ] Code review self-check completed
- [ ] Related documentation updated

---

## 👥 Reviewer Notes

**CC:** @maintainers (for features/security)  
**CC:** @docs-team (for documentation changes)

**Priority:** 🟢 Normal / 🟡 High / 🔴 Critical

---

## 📞 Questions?

If reviewers have questions, respond in comments. Keep PR focused on single concern for faster reviews.

---
